indicators.name: white couches
indicators.rationale: Couches are not suitable for extended computer work as they lack a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: coffee table
indicators.rationale: A coffee table is too small and lacks a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: low lighting
indicators.rationale: The lighting is insufficient for extended computer work, as it is not bright enough to reduce eye strain.

indicators.name: no flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: There is no flat surface at sitting height for a keyboard and monitor.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (solo). The presence of white couches and a coffee table suggests a living room setup rather than a dedicated workspace. The low lighting and lack of a flat personal work surface further undermine the suitability for extended computer work.
